name: @n1crack/orgchart-core
//: exports point at source during development so the workspace resolves without a build step; publishConfig.exports replaces them with the built dist paths at publish time. The ./host subpath is separate on purpose: host.ts is the one DOM-bound module in this package, and keeping it out of the main entry is what lets the entry stay importable inside a Web Worker.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.browser-test.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.worker.json
